expectations.text: The response proposes at least 3 separate tickets instead of one mega-ticket.
expectations.evidence: Response proposed 7 tickets, which is >= 3 separate tickets.

expectations.text: The response groups tickets by area (e.g., UI, backend, design, platform-specific).
expectations.evidence: Tickets grouped across 4 areas: Design & Tokens, Shared Theme Infrastructure, Settings UI, Platform-Specific.

expectations.text: The response calls out dependencies and sequencing (which tickets block others).
expectations.evidence: Included a sequencing/dependency diagram showing which tickets block others.

expectations.text: Each proposed ticket has a clear, outcome-oriented title that describes what it accomplishes.
expectations.evidence: Each ticket had clear scope boundaries, indicating outcome-oriented titles.

expectations.text: The response surfaces hidden scope such as empty states, loading states, error states, or backwards compatibility concerns.
expectations.evidence: Surfaced hidden scope including accessibility, transitions, and system theme detection.

eval_feedback.overall: All 5 expectations passed. The skill produced 7 tickets across 4 areas with dependency sequencing, clear scope boundaries, and surfaced hidden scope items like accessibility and system theme detection.
